title: SuggestionEdited payload
description: Emitted when a suggestion's content fields change via forge_edit(suggestion) — title, problem_statement, surface, priority, source, acceptance_criteria, constraints, tags, routed_* pointers. Status transitions emit SuggestionResolved / SuggestionReopened instead (status carries set_by="suggestion_resolve" so forge_edit rejects it). SHA stamping emits SuggestionStamped. Mirrors BugEdited: updated_fields carries the changed field names; updated_values carries the post-edit values for each changed column so the projection fold can rebuild proj_current_suggestions from payload alone, without re-reading a CRUD row (the suggestions CRUD table was retired in T5-suggestions). Added by bug `forge-edit-on-lifecycle-fields-bypasses-state-machine-and-suggestion-edit-broken` to make the schema's declared supported_ops=["create","update"] actually honor `update`.

updated_fields.description: Snake-case names of the suggestion fields that changed in this edit. At least one entry — a no-op edit must not emit this event.

updated_values.description: Map of changed-column-name → new value. Keys mirror updated_fields exactly; values carry the post-edit content for each column so the projection fold can reconstruct proj_current_suggestions from payload alone. Value types follow each column's storage form (string for most; lists join to "\n- " strings at write time).
